title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 491.678 - Child defined
text:
491.678.  Child defined. — For purposes of sections 491.675 to 491.693, the term "child" means a person under seventeen years of age who is the alleged victim in any criminal prosecution under chapter 565, 566 or 568.
(L. 1985 H.B. 366, et al. § 8) 
Effective 7-19-85
